nasb.text: “When a man has on the skin of his body a swelling or a scab or a bright spot, and it becomes an infection of leprosy on the skin of his body, then he shall be brought to Aaron the priest or to one of his sons the priests.

esv.text: “When a person has on the skin of his body a swelling or an eruption or a spot, and it turns into a case of leprous disease on the skin of his body, then he shall be brought to Aaron the priest or to one of his sons the priests,

cnv.text: “如果有人在皮肉上生了瘤，或癬，或火斑，後來皮肉變成了大痲風病症，就要把他帶到一個作祭司的亞倫子孫那裡。

ccb.text: “如果有人皮肤上长肿包、皮疹或白斑，出现麻风病症状，要将他带到祭司亚伦或亚伦做祭司的子孙那里。
